Title: Steal our 5-Minute Social Strategy
Body1_P1: Don't spread yourself thin across five apps. Choose the single platform where your ideal audience already hangs out.
Body1_P2: Spend 5 minutes scrolling niche hashtags. Notice which posts get real comments. Go where the conversations are.
Body2_Heading: Step 2: Write a 3-Line Bio That Converts
Body2_P1: Line one: who you help. Line two: how you help them. Line three: what to do next.
Body2_P2: Drop the cute metaphors. Your bio should read like a clear signpost. Test it aloud — if a stranger wouldn't get it, rewrite.
Body3_Heading: Step 3: Batch One Week of Content in 30 Minutes
Body3_P1: Set a timer for 30 minutes. Brain-dump 7 post ideas — one per day.
Body3_P2: Pick your 3 strongest. Those become your posts. The rest become story ideas or future drafts.
Body4_P1: Eighty percent of your posts should give value — tips, stories, behind-the-scenes.
Body4_P2: The other twenty percent can sell. People unfollow accounts that pitch every single post.
Body5_Heading: Step 5: Reply to 10 People Before You Post
Body5_P1: Before you hit publish, spend 5 minutes leaving thoughtful replies on 10 posts in your niche.
Body5_P2: Not love this — real replies that add something. This puts your name in front of new people before your post goes live.
Body6_P1: Look at your analytics. Find the post with the most saves or shares — not just likes.
Body6_P2: Pin it to the top of your profile. This becomes your silent salesperson while you sleep.
Body7_Heading: Step 7: End Every Post With a Micro-CTA
Body7_P1: Don't just drop value and disappear. Every post needs one small ask — save this, share, comment.
Body7_P2: Micro-CTAs train your audience to interact. The more they engage, the more the platform shows your stuff.
Takeaway: DO THIS FOR 4 WEEKS THEN CHECK YOUR INSIGHTS AND REPEAT WHAT WORKED
